description_long: This is a weathered, brown leather cap with a soft, round crown and a flat, wide brim. The crown features a series of subtle, evenly spaced rivets around its base, giving it a rugged, utilitarian appearance. A leather strap with a metal buckle and clasp runs across the front, secured by metallic fasteners, adding both function and visual interest. The brim is slightly floppy and irregular, with a stitched edge and a visible golden button on one side. The surface of the hat is matte and textured, showing signs of wear and age, which enhances its vintage, practical look. The overall construction suggests durability and comfort, suitable for outdoor or urban use.
description: A rugged brown leather cap with a round crown, wide flat brim, and metal buckle strap, featuring visible rivets and a golden button. The hat has a weathered, matte finish and a utilitarian, vintage style.
description_view_0: Front view shows the leather strap with a metal buckle and clasp, as well as the round crown and wide brim.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the golden button and the slightly floppy, irregular brim edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the even spacing of rivets around the crown and the continuous brim.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again shows the golden button and the brim's stitched edge, with the strap partially visible.
attribute_brim_style: short, flat, and slightly floppy brim
attribute_crown_shape: round and low-profile with a soft, segmented contour
